Session.title: Session
Session.description: A chat session containing metadata about a conversation.

mode.description: The mode of the conversation (chat, image, video, etc.).

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this session.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A single message within a chat session.

content.description: The text content of the message.

thoughts.description: The internal thoughts/reasoning of the model.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the message was created.

sessionId.description: The ID of the parent session.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this message.

/users/{userId}/sessions/{sessionId}/mes.description: Messages within a specific chat session.
